product_definition.title: Horror Event System
product_definition.description: A dynamic horror event and atmosphere management system for UE5.5. Drives scripted scare sequences, ambient audio layering, light flicker, entity spawning, sanity mechanics, and jump scare orchestration via an event timeline.
product_definition.target_audience: Horror game developers targeting atmospheric single-player experiences

core_features: UHorrorEventSubsystem as world subsystem managing event queue
Event timeline asset: ordered list of HorrorEventSteps
Event types: LightFlicker, SoundSting, EntitySpawn, CameraShake, JumpScare, SanityDrain
USanityComponent: sanity float, hallucination trigger threshold
Hallucination system: spawns illusory actors visible only to local player
Ambient audio layering: calm, tense, danger states with crossfade
Jump scare director: positions entity in FOV, triggers sting then despawns
Post-process sanity effect: vignette, chromatic aberration, desaturation
Debug visualizer: event timeline progress overlay
Blueprint callable event triggers for designer control

demo_map_requirements.test_scenario: Player walks through corridor, lights flicker, entity spawns, sanity drains
